title: objects with nested sets
description: Object with two `Set<{s: string; arr: number[]}>` properties. Each nested set serializes to a JSON array of objects and restores via `new Set(v)`; the elements are atomic-shaped (string + number array) so no value transform applies. Binary nests a size-prefixed entry list per set.
notes: Each nested Set round-trips as a JSON array, rehydrated to a Set on decode.
